moments.author: Lionel Messi
moments.quote: It’s incredible that we’re here today, Lamine and I, facing each other after a photo was taken of us when he was just a baby.
moments.why: A surreal, viral throwback moment as Messi and the infant in that photo now face off in the World Cup final—reality feels cinematic.
moments.url: Best sports coverage quoting Messi’s remark about the baby-photo twist

moments.author: Didier Deschamps
moments.quote: England doesn’t want to play this game, and neither do we. But here we are—it is not a friendly, it’s a duty to compete for third place.
moments.why: Brutally honest moment ahead of the World Cup third‑place match—rare candor from a high‑profile coach sparking debate.
moments.url: Sports news quote about Deschamps saying neither side wants to play but they must

moments.author: Didier Deschamps
moments.quote: We have a duty to give it all and reach this last objective.
moments.why: Emotional weight as the legendary coach frames the third‑place match as a responsibility amid a farewell campaign.
moments.url: Article noting Deschamps stressing duty to perform for France in final match

moments.author: Lionel Messi
moments.quote: Honestly, that photo of us is crazy, because—well, that’s life, right? I took a photo with him as a baby, and here we both are, facing off in a World Cup.
moments.why: Messi’s candid, almost philosophical reflection on fate amplified worldwide—emotional resonance that transcends sport.
moments.url: Coverage quoting Messi’s on‑stage remark about the photo being 'crazy' life twist
